raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX XXXX, I discovered I was paying twice for my XXXX XXXX ( {$72.00} ) and XXXX XXXX ( {$13.00} ) once with My authorized Visa card and once with American Express, which was not on the account. 

I talked w/ several AmEx reps, supervisors and the fraud division and told them the bad charges started in XX/XX/XXXX and I demanded a refund. They only offered 60 days, amended to 120 days for XXXX, XXXX, XXXX, XXXX, XXXX. 

No refund on 11 months from XX/XX/XXXX to XX/XX/XXXX ( {$920.00} ). 

I asked for XXXX XXXX  number, got two wrong ones and finally tweeted at XXXX XXXX, They sent me to a help site that didn't work. AmEx would not assist in the communication with XXXX about this unauthorized account charge.
